title: High CPU usage due to Google nodes
symptom: The n8n container suddenly spikes to 100% CPU usage, particularly when running Google Drive nodes. No logs are visible to diagnose the issue.
applies_when: Running n8n in a Docker container
not_this_if: CPU usage is normal or below 100%
No Google nodes are being executed
root_cause: A common cause for high CPU usage with Google nodes is an authentication error loop, where the node continuously attempts to authenticate without success, leading to excessive resource consumption.
fix_steps: Restart the n8n container to break the loop
Check the Docker logs for any authentication errors
agent_instruction: Restart the n8n container and review the logs for authentication issues.
